items.label: Infra Outputs Captured — Interfaces Written
messages: Infra handoff is complete. Here's a summary of what was done:  **Created `/apps/sample-app/in-progress/infra-interfaces.md`** containing:  | Section | Contents | |---|---| | **Endpoints** | Function App, APIM Gateway, Static Web App, Cosmos DB URLs | | **Resource Names** | Resource group, Function App, APIM, SWA, Cosmos DB account, Key Vault | | **Auth Config** | Entra Tenant/Client IDs, CI/CD client IDs, CORS origins | | **Cosmos DB (Kanban)** | Account, endpoint, database (`sample-app-db`), new container (`Tasks`), partition key (`/workspaceId`), auth method | | **Terraform Outputs** | All 14 outputs with `application_insights_connection_string` masked as `<HIDDEN>` (sensitive) | | **Env Vars for Downstream** | Backend, Frontend, E2E, and Integration test environment variables |  **Security:** The `application_insights_connection_string` (marked `sensitive: true` by Terraform) was replaced with `<HIDDEN>`. All other outputs are non-sensitive resource names/URLs.

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): infra-handoff interfaces"
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app && npm run pipeline:complete kanban-task-board-enhanced infra-handoff
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): mark infra-handoff complete"

items.label: Development Complete — Frontend
messages: Now let me explore the codebase structure and understand existing patterns.
Now let me explore the key frontend files I need to modify/reference:
Good. Now let me read the key files I'll need to reference:
Let me check the existing page patterns and E2E fixtures:
Now let me check an existing page for reference and the existing E2E test:
Let me check the CI/CD workflow for env vars compliance:

Good — the frontend deploy workflow already has `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_ENTRA_CLIENT_ID`, and `NEXT_PUBLIC_ENTRA_TENANT_ID` from infra-interfaces.md. No CI/CD changes needed for frontend.  Now I have all the context needed. Let me implement the Kanban board page, NavBar update, and E2E tests.
Now update the NavBar to add the "Task Board" link:
Now create the E2E test file:
Now let me run Jest to verify:
All tests pass. Now run the Next.js build:
All passing. Now verify E2E tests compile:
All 11 tests listed, including the 3 new task board tests. Now verify lockfile:
Lockfile is in sync. Now let me run the review and commit:

shellCommands.command: cat /workspaces/DAGent-t/.github/workflows/deploy-frontend.yml 2>/dev/null || cat /workspaces/DAGent-t/.github/workflows/deploy-swa.yml 2>/dev/null || echo "No frontend deploy workflow found"
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app && npx playwright test --config playwright.config.ts --list 2>&1 | tail -20
